meaning: n.乳钵,槌,杵v.用槌磨,用杵捣
examples: There was a wok, a grinding stone, and a huge mortar and pestle, so those are what I left with, and I have all of them.
Bird-shaped pestle (made 4-8, 000 years ago). Stone, found in Papua New guinea.
Their daughter told her mother she heard her father grinding a pestle and mortar in the bedroom.
Grind the cumin and coriander finely with a mortar and pestle or in a spice grinder.
Though, apart from the exposed brick, mortar and pestle used to grind pigments, and an easel with Cole's doodles etched into it, much of the contents aren't original to the studio.
